title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
